# NetApp Case 2008906763 – PS2 Fan RPM is failed or missing

## Case Overview
Case [NetApp log # 2008906763 details: PS2 Fan RPM is failed or missi](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem&EntityRepresentationId=cd344ce1-c894-456a-a9fc-1392865488c1) was opened for fan sensor alerts on NetApp HCI cluster **THC-HCI-CLUSTER**. [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  

The alerts were observed on H610S storage nodes and were reported to automatically clear after a short duration. [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  

## Problem Description
The system generated the following alert:
- **PS2 Fan RPM is failed or missing**

Observed behavior:
- Alerts occurred only on **H610S storage nodes** (not H410S) [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  
- Alerts resolved automatically within approximately **2 minutes** [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  

## Root Cause
- Identified as a **known false positive caused by the current firmware (FW) revision** [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  

## Resolution / Actions Taken
- NetApp confirmed the alerts are **false positives** and not indicative of hardware failure [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  
- Stated that **DevOps is working on a future fix** [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  
- Guidance provided:
  - Alerts that resolve within a few minutes can be **safely ignored** [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  
- Case handling:
  - NetApp proposed to **archive the case** if no further questions remained [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  

## KB / Bug References
- NetApp KB:  
  https://kb.netapp.com/Advice_and_Troubleshooting/Hybrid_Cloud_Infrastructure/H_Series/H610S_fanSensor_alert_PSx_Fan_RPM_is_failed_or_missing [1](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxsAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)[2](https://outlook.office365.com/owa/?ItemID=AAMkAGNhYjk3NjliLWRkNjYtNDdjNS05ZjJhLThlNDdmMDYxYjVjYQBGAAAAAAAGRCxapeEuTI8Rk25YN8wGBwBlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAAEcDAABlIM2hzC3dSK2NkNgCby%2fuAAAAARxpAAA%3d&exvsurl=1&viewmodel=ReadMessageItem)  

## Executive Summary
PS2 Fan RPM alerts were triggered on H610S nodes in the HCI cluster and automatically cleared within minutes.  
NetApp confirmed this as a known firmware-related false positive.  
No corrective action was required beyond monitoring, and the case was eligible for closure.
